from __future__ import annotations


class Policy:
    def can_send_email(self, role: str) -> bool:
        return role == "admin"


class InvoiceEmailSender:
    def __init__(self, policy: Policy) -> None:
        self.policy = policy

    def send(self, role: str, body: str) -> str:
        if not self.policy.can_send_email(role):
            raise PermissionError("admin only")
        return f"sent:{body}"
